records.ety: [NL., from Gr. <?/ a shining forth, fr. <?/ to shine forth; <?/ out + <?/ to shine.]

defs: A fancied perception of flashes of light, a symptom of epilepsy; hence, epilepsy itself; convulsions.
notes: ☞ The term is generally restricted to a convulsive affection attending pregnancy and parturition, and to infantile convulsions.
